tables.description: Information about customers and their demographics. Use this to find customer location details or trace unique customers.

columns.customer_id: Unique key for each customer order. Every order has a unique customer_id (joins with orders.customer_id).
columns.customer_unique_id: Unique identifier for a customer. Use this to count actual repeat customers or group purchases by customer.
columns.customer_zip_code_prefix: First 5 digits of customer zip code.
columns.customer_city: City name where the customer is located (e.g., 'sao paulo', 'rio de janeiro').
columns.customer_state: State abbreviation where the customer is located (e.g., 'SP', 'RJ').

tables.description: Core orders table containing purchase status and timeline tracking.

columns.order_id: Unique identifier of the order (joins with order_items.order_id, order_payments.order_id, order_reviews.order_id).
columns.customer_id: Key to the customer details for this specific order (joins with customers.customer_id).
columns.order_status: Status of the order. Possible values: 'delivered', 'shipped', 'invoiced', 'processing', 'approved', 'canceled', 'unavailable', 'created'.
columns.order_purchase_timestamp: Timestamp when the order was placed by the customer.
columns.order_approved_at: Timestamp when the payment was approved.
columns.order_delivered_carrier_date: Timestamp when the order was handed over to the carrier.
columns.order_delivered_customer_date: Actual delivery timestamp when the customer received the order. Compare with order_estimated_delivery_date to check for late deliveries.
columns.order_estimated_delivery_date: Estimated delivery date committed to the customer at the time of purchase.

tables.description: Details of the items included in each order, including pricing, sellers, and shipping limits.

columns.order_id: Unique identifier of the order (joins with orders.order_id).
columns.order_item_id: Sequential number identifying the number of items included in the same order (e.g., 1 for first item, 2 for second).
columns.product_id: Unique identifier of the product (joins with products.product_id).
columns.seller_id: Unique identifier of the seller (joins with sellers.seller_id).
columns.shipping_limit_date: Seller shipping limit date to hand over the product to the carrier.
columns.price: Price of the individual item in BRL (Brazilian Real).
columns.freight_value: Freight (shipping) value of the individual item in BRL.

tables.description: Information about order payments, including payment methods, installments, and values.

columns.order_id: Unique identifier of the order (joins with orders.order_id).
columns.payment_sequential: A customer can pay an order with more than one payment method. This is the sequential order of payments.
columns.payment_type: Payment method chosen by the customer. E.g., 'credit_card', 'boleto' (ticket/bank slip), 'voucher', 'debit_card'.
columns.payment_installments: Number of installments chosen by the customer (for credit card payments).
columns.payment_value: Total amount paid for this payment sequence in BRL.

tables.description: Customer satisfaction reviews and ratings submitted after receiving orders.

columns.order_id: Unique identifier of the order (joins with orders.order_id).
columns.review_comment_title: Title of the review comment left by the customer.
columns.review_comment_message: Message body of the review left by the customer.
columns.review_creation_date: Timestamp when the review invitation was sent to the customer.
columns.review_answer_timestamp: Timestamp when the customer submitted the review response.

tables.description: Catalog of products sold, including category names and physical dimensions.

columns.product_id: Unique identifier of the product (joins with order_items.product_id).
columns.product_name_lenght: Number of characters in the product name.
columns.product_description_lenght: Number of characters in the product description.

tables.description: Information about registered sellers and their locations.

columns.seller_id: Unique identifier of the seller (joins with order_items.seller_id).
columns.seller_zip_code_prefix: First 5 digits of the seller's zip code.
columns.seller_city: City where the seller is located.
columns.seller_state: State abbreviation where the seller is located (e.g., 'SP', 'RJ').

tables.description: Translation table map between Portuguese product category names and their English counterparts.

columns.product_category_name: Product category name in Portuguese (joins with products.product_category_name).
columns.product_category_name_english: Product category name translated to English (use this to display or filter categories in English).
